name: Styling Promo Cards in Shopify Editor
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can style promo cards directly within the Shopify editor without editing code, making it easy to create and customize promotional content using visual tools. This no-code approach enables merchants to quickly deploy promotional campaigns without requiring developer resources."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Configuring promo cards through the Shopify editor provides a streamlined workflow for creating promotional content that integrates with your search and collection pages. By using visual editing tools to control promo card appearance and behavior, you can rapidly test different promotional approaches and adjust campaigns based on performance, supporting more agile merchandising strategies."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Promo Cards serve as versatile assets for promoting various content alongside product listings within your Shopify store. They offer opportunities to highlight new assortments, drive traffic to campaign pages, convey product narratives, and incentivize customer behavior through promotions."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/JPZLBY26XZBY/77c27e0bb6cd4c97f3635159e63c9c1c30141cc957e490d6d78932b19e379c8c-c64aaae-promo-card-1.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/JPZLBY26XZBY/77c27e0bb6cd4c97f3635159e63c9c1c30141cc957e490d6d78932b19e379c8c-c64aaae-promo-card-1.png", "name": "77c27e0bb6cd4c97f3635159e63c9c1c30141cc957e490d6d78932b19e379c8c-c64aaae-Promo_Card_1.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 273746, "width": 410, "height": 302, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FJPZLBY26XZBY%2F77c27e0bb6cd4c97f3635159e63c9c1c30141cc957e490d6d78932b19e379c8c-c64aaae-promo-card-1.png", "mediaID": 1117, "dateInserted": "2025-10-22T12:59:32+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "
Now, we have simplified the process of styling Promo Cards for Shopify merchants by enabling direct styling control within the Shopify Editor. This eliminates the need to toggle between the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://dashboard.findify.io/auth/sign-in", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Merchant Dashboard"}]}, {"text": " and Shopify, streamlining the workflow."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This document provides a step-by-step guide for creating and styling Promo Cards, including the functionality to apply different style profiles."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Creating Promo Cards"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Log in to the ", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://dashboard.findify.io/auth/sign-in", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Merchant Dashboard", "bold": true}]}, {"text": ".", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to either "}, {"text": "Search", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Promo Cards", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Smart Collections > Promo Cards.", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click Create New Campaign and fill in the campaign details (e.g., title, search terms)

"children": [{"text": "Modify grid settings using the "}, {"text": "Card Row Span", "bold": true}, {"text": " (vertical stretch) and "}, {"text": "Card Column Span", "bold": true}, {"text": " (horizontal stretch) controls."}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Save changes."}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "📘 Note:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Removing both profiles from the Shopify Editor will revert the Promo Cards to default styles."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Customizable Style Options"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Within the Shopify Editor, you can customize:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Positioning:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Control the layout of elements within the Promo Card."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Text Styling:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Update size, font, and color for headers, subheaders, and CTA buttons."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Grid Settings:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Use row and column span options to control the card’s footprint in the product grid."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These options allow you to create visually distinct Promo Cards that align with your store’s branding."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "FAQ"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Q: Can I create Promo Cards directly in the Shopify Editor?"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A: No. Promo Cards must first be created in the Merchant Dashboard. Styling can then be applied in the Shopify Editor if desired."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Q: What happens if I do not assign a profile to a Promo Card?"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A: The Promo Card will inherit the default profile settings."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Q: Can I style multiple Promo Cards using the same profile?"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A: Yes. Multiple Promo Cards can share the same profile (Default or Secondary), allowing consistent styling across cards."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Q: Will styling changes in Shopify Editor overwrite the Merchant Dashboard settings?"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A: No. Shopify Editor styles are applied independently and do not affect the Promo Card setup in the Merchant Dashboard."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Q: What happens if I remove the Default Profile and/or Secondary Profile sections from the Shopify editor setup?"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A: If you remove the Default or Secondary Profile sections from the Shopify editor, the initial default styles will automatically be applied to all Promo Cards. This means any customizations made in the Shopify editor for these profiles will no longer be visible."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For further assistance or inquiries, feel free to contact us on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
